nodes.label: Skills (policy/workflow) vs Graphify (codebase facts)
nodes.rationale: Free-text chat still uses graphify for codebase facts; enabled skills add policy/workflow on top via truncated system-prompt injection.

nodes.label: Planner (/do)
nodes.rationale: Splits a task into ordered vibe and/or research steps; user-chosen model via cli.planner or /planner set.

nodes.label: Chat host tools
nodes.rationale: Tool-using host agent: list_dir, read_file, write_file, edit_file, run_terminal, grep, glob, graphify_query, toolbox_query; mutating tools require per-command approval.

nodes.label: Runtime CLI soft-upgrade
nodes.rationale: When on PATH, host tools prefer eza/tre, rg, fd, bat; run_terminal soft-upgrades ls→eza, cat→bat, grep→rg; destructive classics like rm are not auto-rewritten.

nodes.label: Free-durable profile
nodes.rationale: Default orchestration: survive a full workday on free/trial APIs; one scarce bucket per critical role; spread Groq across model IDs; reserve compound-mini for search; prefer durable free models; cascade without OpenRouter sinks.

nodes.label: Free-tier design goals
nodes.rationale: Survive full personal workday; one scarce bucket = one critical role; spread Groq load; reserve only free live-search path; prefer durable free models over expiring promos; cascade without OpenRouter sinks.

nodes.label: One scarce bucket = one critical role
nodes.rationale: Never burn Cohere or OpenRouter :free on three nodes; Cohere only on grounding; OpenRouter off hot path; compound-mini only for web_search.
nodes.norm_label: one scarce bucket = one critical role

nodes.label: Fallback cascade DAG
nodes.rationale: cohere→mistral→agnes→groq→gemini→cerebras→groq with skip-visited; openrouter→agnes (not deeper :free); empty HTTP 200 treated as failure.

nodes.label: ResearchProfile typology
nodes.rationale: Domain-agnostic classification: purpose (basic/applied), depth (exploratory/descriptive/explanatory), data approach (quant/qual/mixed), design (experimental/non-experimental). Feeds search facets, grounding outline, synthesizer framing.

nodes.label: System B anti-hallucination multi-source path
nodes.rationale: Primary URL fetch, multi-facet live search, citation URL verification, scrub_ungrounded_claims, merge_host_verified_primary, GROUNDED FACTS for research→vibe chaining, host plausibility filters.

nodes.label: Soft quotas vs real limits
nodes.rationale: YAML soft-caps are conservative fractions of public free/trial limits (e.g. Groq 800 of ~1000 RPD; Cohere 28 of ~1000/mo).

nodes.label: OpenRouter provider
nodes.rationale: Off free-durable hot path; ~50 RPD shared free; cascade hops to Agnes not deeper :free models.

nodes.label: agnes-2.0-flash
nodes.rationale: Free text hot-path primary (~20 RPM, large context, tool-calling, coding, agents); used for chat, planner, architect, compressor and many fallbacks.

nodes.label: codestral-latest
nodes.rationale: Best free coding specialist in stack; vibe coder primary on Mistral Experiment.

nodes.label: openai/gpt-oss-120b
nodes.rationale: Open reasoning backbone on Groq (~1k RPD); debugger and synthesizer primary; Agnes/cascade backup target.

nodes.label: groq/compound-mini
nodes.rationale: Only free stack model with integrated Tavily-class live search (~250 RPD); reserved for web_search; hard fail if no live search.

nodes.label: command-a-plus-05-2026
nodes.rationale: Sole Cohere primary in product; trial-tier RAG/grounding with documents= path; ultra-scarce monthly budget.

nodes.label: openai/gpt-oss-safeguard-20b
nodes.rationale: Safety/moderation-flavored model with independent ~1k RPD counter; research safety_filter primary.

nodes.label: vibe_coding.architect
nodes.rationale: Surgical JSON specs + multi-file planning; Agnes primary so Cohere is not burned.

nodes.label: vibe_coding.coder
nodes.rationale: Codestral primary for free coding specialization; Agnes fallback if Mistral rate-limited.

nodes.label: vibe_coding.debugger
nodes.rationale: Fix loops (≤ max_fix_cycles=3) need strong reasoning + roomy per-model RPD; GPT-OSS-120B primary.

nodes.label: deep_research.context_compressor
nodes.rationale: High-frequency keyword/trend extraction; Agnes free volume replaces OpenRouter/hy3.

nodes.label: deep_research.web_search
nodes.rationale: No role-level fallback; pipeline hard-aborts if search admits no live search (anti-fabrication).

nodes.label: deep_research.grounding
nodes.rationale: Single Cohere primary in whole product; Mistral Small fallback preserves pipeline at lower grounding quality.

nodes.label: deep_research.synthesizer
nodes.rationale: Long report assembly on Groq 120b; not Cohere to avoid double-taxing the 28/day pool with grounding.

nodes.label: Optional orchestration profiles
nodes.rationale: openrouter-boosted, free-max-quality, local-first alternatives to default free-durable.

nodes.label: Free-tier anti-patterns
nodes.rationale: Avoid multi-role Cohere burn, OpenRouter :free on hot path, compound-mini for chat, hy3 past promo, gemini→openrouter cascade, best-leaderboard-everywhere.

nodes.label: config/defaults_model_router.yaml (factory)
nodes.rationale: Factory reset snapshot for free-durable orchestration; multiagent config reset restores this to live model_router.yaml.

nodes.label: Toolbox profile: core
nodes.rationale: Modern shell essentials (high ROI): eza, bat, ripgrep, fd, fzf, zoxide, starship, atuin, git-delta, mise, jq, rip2, tldr.

nodes.label: CLI context settings
nodes.rationale: context_limit_tokens 16000, use_graphify true, graphify_budget 1200, compact_keep_recent_messages 4.
